## Description

<!-- SECTION:DESCRIPTION:BEGIN -->
Captured on the 2026-05-05 morning briefing. Per call: 'book my parking at the Millbrae BART Station tomorrow for ahead of my trip to Austin.'

## Booking research (2026-05-06, agent — research only, no booking)

**Booking URL:** https://www.bart.gov/parking — official BART parking landing page. Long-term reservations route through SP+ (the BART parking concessionaire) at https://reserve.spplus.com/property/22/bart-millbrae or the BART app.

**What to do (login required — Matteo's BART/SP+ account):**
1. Open https://www.bart.gov/parking → "Reserve Long-Term Parking" → choose Millbrae station.
   (Direct link: https://reserve.spplus.com/property/22/bart-millbrae if the page reorgs.)
2. Sign in to the SP+ account (or BART account if linked).
3. Pick the date range — outbound is **Wed 5/6 evening** (UA 1176, 6:25 PM SFO); return TBD (TASK-108 still open). For now: 5/6 evening through projected return Sun 5/10. Adjust once return flight is booked.
4. Select "Daily fee parking" or "Long-term reserved parking" — Millbrae offers both. Long-term reserved is the safer choice for a 4–5-day stay.
5. Pay; save the confirmation email.

**Notes:**
- Matteo is flying tonight. If long-term reserved is sold out for the dates, "daily fee" lots at Millbrae are first-come/first-served and don't require pre-booking but aren't guaranteed.
- BART itself doesn't run the reservation system; SP+ does. If the SP+ flow breaks, fallback is the BART Official app (parking section).
- Cost (rough, verify at booking): ~$5–6/day for daily fee, ~$30–40/day for reserved. 4 nights ≈ $20–25 daily-fee or $120–160 reserved.
<!-- SECTION:DESCRIPTION:END -->
